subcodes.first_line: How glorious that the Hand of Divine Will, glorified be His majesty, is gracious, and that the stars, freed from the darkness of the prison-sky, shine forth resplendent and luminous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبذا ید اراده حق جل جلاله مساعد و نجوم از ظلمت سماء سجن فارغ و بازغ و منیر و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @law of Huququ'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
